# PERF-166 positive: rows.Scan into a *string with nil check
lang: go
file: PERF-166-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func LoadName(rows *sql.Rows) (string, error) {
	var name *string
	if err := rows.Scan(&name); err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	if name != nil {
		return *name, nil
	}
	return "", nil
}
